sections.paragraph:
ϰολλάω [ϰόλλα ‘glue’] ‘adhere to’, pass. and most oft. in act. sense and w. dat.

—a. of things stick to, cling to Lk 10:11. In extended sense of a pers. in relation to a thing Ro 12:9; ϰολλήϑητι τῷ ἅμαρτι τούτῳ stick close to this chariot Ac 8:29. Of sins viewed as a heap touching heaven Rv 18:5.

—b. of pers. relating to pers. stick to Mt 19:5; attach to Lk 15:15; engage with, be involved with Ac 5:13; 10:28; 1 Cor 6:16f; join Ac 9:26.
